## SYSTEM RITUALS

- `|[ST4RT.io::` → Initiates working thread
- `::S4VE.io]|` → Closes working thread, triggers export
- `lock naming system` → Finalizes syntax rules
- `lock dual-ID logic` → Locks canonical + styled ID layer
- `run full cascade` → Begins system-wide export generation
- `generate SYS_EXPORT_0412_MASTER.md` → Triggers this very file
